title: tephrocactus nigrispinus subsp. nigrispinus
intro: Tephrocactus nigrispinus subsp. nigrispinus, also known as the black-spined prickly pear, is a species of cactus that belongs to the family Cactaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tephrocactus nigrispinus subsp. nigrispinus include wound healing, skin protection, and the treatment of gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used topically as a poultice to aid in the healing process.
